examples: The research findings were published online in the APA journal Neuropsychology.
The application of brain electrical activity mapping in neuropsychology is intro-duced.
Objective To investigate the relationship between cerebral blood flow and neuropsychology in divers.
Neuropsychology studies show that compulsive hoarders have deficits in executive functioning, attention, memory, organization and emotional regulation.
The field of neuropsychology -- the applied form of neuroscience -- is now offering an emerging consciousness about the brain's inner workings.
